case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. JESSICA C HERNANDEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62557424)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-06-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JESSICA C DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-24-2018

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 62636984), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. SERVED APR-14-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-14-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JESSICA C
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-06-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
